Uses of Interface
javax.microedition.media.Controllable

  • Packages that use Controllable 
    Package Description
    javax.microedition.media  
    javax.microedition.media.protocol  

    • Uses of Controllable in javax.microedition.media

      Subinterfaces of Controllable in javax.microedition.media 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      interface  Player
      Player controls the rendering of time based media data.

    • Uses of Controllable in javax.microedition.media.protocol

      Subinterfaces of Controllable in javax.microedition.media.protocol 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      interface  SourceStream
      Abstracts a single stream of media data.
      Classes in javax.microedition.media.protocol that implement Controllable 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  DataSource
      A DataSource is an abstraction for media protocol-handlers.
